name: smart-content-creator-skill
description: Specialized content generation engine optimized for Xiaohongshu style guides and platform specifications.
description_cn: 小红书爆款内容智能创作技能，内置平台风格指南，支持自动适配标题公式、表情符号与热门话题标签。

name: baoyu-post-to-wechat
description: Automated pipeline for publishing markdown draft formats directly onto WeChat Official Account editors.
description_cn: 将 Markdown 内容无损渲染排版并一键发布至微信公众号后台草稿箱。

name: baoyu-xhs-images
description: Automatic info-cards generation for Xiaohongshu posts, with various visual templates and layout configs.
description_cn: 自动生成小红书风格信息卡片图（1-10张），支持 11 种视觉样式和 8 种布局架构。

name: baoyu-post-to-x
description: Publish content directly onto X (Twitter), supporting single tweets, threads, and media attachments.
description_cn: 将生成的内容发布到 X (Twitter)，支持单条推文、长推文线索（Thread）及媒体附件上传。

name: baoyu-comic
description: Generate knowledge comics or stories based on inputs, supporting artistic styles.
description_cn: 根据输入的知识点自动创作连环知识漫画，支持多种插画和艺术风格输出。

name: baoyu-cover-image
description: Generates high quality articles cover banners, supporting typical landscape and square dimensions.
name_cn: 文章多尺寸封面图生成
description_cn: 为文章快速生成高质量的跨平台封面大图，支持 2.35:1, 16:9, 1:1 等多种比例尺寸。

name: superpowers
description: Interactive brainstorming helper designed to output creative hooks, strategies, and solutions.
description_cn: 头脑风暴与创意概念生成器，根据上下文突破固有认知瓶颈，产出高增益选题与运营方案。

name: doc-coauthoring
description: Collaborative markdown document writing co-author, outlining chapters and drafting with structural guidance.
name_cn: AI 文档联合写作助手
description_cn: Anthropic 官方出品。支持先生成大纲结构、再按章节展开精细化撰写，提供极强的写作过程掌控力。

name: frontend-design
description: Anthropic official frontend design companion, helping build interactive mockups and clean CSS layouts.
description_cn: Anthropic 官方出品。协助设计高颜值的交互原型与纯 CSS 栅格布局，提供丰富的美学微调方案。

name: web-design-guidelines
description: Vercel web design helper, providing responsive layout patterns, components, and best practices.
name_cn: Vercel 网页设计布局规程
description_cn: Vercel 实验室出品。提供现代化网页的栅格布局、间距断点规范及极致的极简主义美学参考设计。

name: vercel-react-best-practices
description: Vercel React engineering audit skill, validating styling, hydration issues, performance bottlenecks, and structure.
name_cn: Vercel React 开发最佳实践
description_cn: 自动扫描 React 项目中的骨架结构、客户端渲染水合问题及潜在的样式重叠，给出具体重构建议。

name: shadcn-ui
description: Inject or build shadcn/ui components programmatically into your React project layouts.
description_cn: 自动在目标 React 目录中生成并装配符合 Tailwind 的 Shadcn-UI 样式组件，无需手动复制黏贴代码。

name: seo-audit
description: Perform comprehensive SEO audits covering metadata, sitemaps, robots.txt, and page semantic titles.
name_cn: SEO 搜索引擎优化审计
description_cn: 对整站开展 GEO/SEO 优化审计，包含元数据、robots.txt 规范、以及多级标题的关键词合理密度审查。
